title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
